UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Joe Siino is present.
Attorney Marc Seidenfeld appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Ryan C. Ballou and Hubbert Lee are present.
Attorney Robert B. Hodil representing the defendants through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAY-07-2012 is vacated.
